statement: In every magma, Equation 1138 (`x = y * ((y * (z * z)) * y)`) implies Equation 245 (`x = (y * (z * y)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0911
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op z z)) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z y)) w)
